0.text: Irregularly circumscribed mass lesion in the paramediastinal area of the right lung upper lobe anterior segment

1.text: Mass contains multiple coarse calcifications with a mildly heterogeneous internal structure

2.text: Borders of the mass cannot be clearly distinguished on non-contrast examination

3.text: Stable mild bronchiectasis in the lung parenchyma adjacent to the lesions in the anterior upper lobe of the right lung

4.text: A few subcentimeter non-specific nodules in both lungs
